source_name: Code4rena Noya Findings and Analysis Report (2024-04)
finding_title: _getPositionTVL of UNIv3Connector wrongly assumes ownership of all liquidity of the provided ticks inside positionManager
summary: When _getPositionTVL is called, it queries position information from the pool using the calculated key. However, it assumes that all liquidity within the provided ticks in the positionManager is owned by the connector.
root_cause: incorrect accounting or validation logic in _getPositionTVL of UNIv3Connector wrongly assumes ownership of all liquidity of the provided ticks inside positionManager, causing the protocol to compute or enforce the wrong state transition
broken_invariants: vault valuation must remain correct under the root cause: incorrect accounting or validation logic in _getPositionTVL of UNIv3Connector wrongly assumes ownership of all liquidity of the provided ticks inside positionManager, causing the protocol to compute or enforce the wrong state transition
oracle, TVL, and collateral valuation must use correctly scaled, fresh, and manipulation-resistant inputs
privileged, owner, and license checks must be enforced on every value-moving path, not only on the nominal entry point
attack_preconditions: the affected component is deployed or configured in the way described by the final report
the report-described user, keeper, vault, connector, oracle, or liquidation flow is reachable in the audited code version
attacker_capability: external user, keeper, liquidator, vault participant, or protocol-integrated actor able to trigger the affected flow
trigger_actions: execute the report-described function sequence or state transition
observe mispricing, accounting drift, value loss, fund lock, or denial of service

impact.description: When _getPositionTVL is called, it queries position information from the pool using the calculated key. However, it assumes that all liquidity within the provided ticks in the positionManager is owned by the connector.

why_not_higher: already classified as High in the final C4 report
why_not_lower: included as a validated High/Medium C4 finding with public report evidence and affected code/finding references
common_false_positive_angles: verify the same component and configuration are in scope
check whether the issue is reachable by an untrusted or economically motivated actor
confirm the impact is more than a view-only mismatch, dust loss, or privileged-only misconfiguration
mitigations: User positionsManager positions getter instead to provide accurate liquidity owner by connector.
